title: HUD Reignited
description: This resource pack changes the boring to HUD to something great
body:
![HUD REIGNITED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05dcca413a7a61d592bcc8a91189ef99123e85d5.png)
**HUD Reignited** completely refreshes the default Minecraft HUD with a cleaner, sharper, and more modern design — while still keeping the vanilla feel.

This pack is made for players who love Minecraft’s original style but want something that looks more polished and satisfying during gameplay. Whether you're building, PvPing, or surviving hardcore nights, the new HUD makes everything feel smoother and more immersive.

---
### **What This Pack Does**

- Revamps the in-game HUD
- Cleaner spacing and improved visual clarity
- Modernized textures without breaking the vanilla vibe

---
### **Customize this pack as you want with Respackopts**
  **You can customize**
- Armor bar
- Hunger bar
- Hotbar
- hotbar selection

---
_Heart textures are by **Recolourful container**_

_hungerbar textures are by **Vanilla Tweaks**_

_hotbar textures are inspired by **Colourful OreUi** with slightly modifications

_exp bar is by **enchanted** rp and by **Colourful OreUi**_

---
### **Respackopts Support**

HUD Reignited supports Respackopts, allowing better compatibility and customization options.
If you use Respackopts, the pack will integrate smoothly with your setup.
![By hamz(hyper punchy)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a06681b2a8119241a9ba1919c896a0cfbeebf374.png)
the image is by Hamz(HyperPunchy)
